touches.ai_summary: Cold outreach to VP of Sales at CompassDynamics regarding forecasting accuracy challenges. No response received.
Follow-up cold email resulted in brief response from Layla expressing interest in learning more about forecasting solutions. She mentioned current challenges with revenue predictability.

questions_asked.question: What makes your forecasting approach different from standard CRM analytics?
questions_asked.answer: Our platform uses real-time pipeline signals and AI-powered deal scoring to predict outcomes 2-3 quarters ahead, not just current quarter.

next_steps: Schedule discovery call to dive into current forecasting process

touches.ai_summary: Layla confirmed interest and shared that their current forecasting process relies heavily on spreadsheets and gut feel. She's available for a call next week to discuss their specific pain points.

questions_asked.question: Who else on your team would benefit from being involved in the conversation?
questions_asked.answer: Right now it's mostly me managing the sales ops side. I'll loop in others if it makes sense.

next_steps: Discovery call scheduled for Thursday at 2pm

touches.ai_summary: 29-minute discovery call covered CompassDynamics' current forecasting challenges, team size (11 sales reps), and revenue goals. Layla expressed frustration with manual reporting processes eating up 8-10 hours weekly. Discussed unlimited automation tier benefits for their use case.

questions_asked.question: What does your current forecasting process look like week to week?
questions_asked.answer: I spend about 2 hours every Monday consolidating spreadsheets from reps, then another 6-8 hours doing analysis and building exec reports.

questions_asked.question: What happens if your forecast is off by more than 10-15%?
questions_asked.answer: Our CFO gets anxious and we have emergency pipeline reviews. It's happened three times this year already.

questions_asked.question: How quickly can your system be up and running with our data?
questions_asked.answer: Typically 2-3 weeks for full implementation including CRM integration and historical data import.

objections: We've looked at analytics tools before and they never get adopted by the team
next_steps: Share case study from similar fintech company
Follow-up call to address adoption concerns

touches.ai_summary: Brief 11-minute follow-up call to address team adoption concerns. Discussed change management approach and training support. Layla seemed more comfortable but mentioned budget will need to be approved.

questions_asked.question: What kind of training and onboarding support do you provide?
questions_asked.answer: We include 2 weeks of hands-on training, dedicated CSM, and ongoing office hours for the first 90 days.

next_steps: Layla to review case study and discuss internally
Reconvene next week to move forward

touches.ai_summary: Layla confirmed internal buy-in on the value and wants to move forward with a proposal. She mentioned budget constraints and asked about flexibility on pricing for their team size.

questions_asked.question: Is there any flexibility on pricing given we're a growing team?
questions_asked.answer: Let me work up a proposal that makes sense for your current team and growth plans.

next_steps: Send formal proposal with pricing options

touches.ai_summary: Sent proposal for $8,800 ACV (discounted from standard pricing) for 11 seats on unlimited automation tier. Layla acknowledged receipt and is reviewing with her team before our scheduled call.
next_steps: Proposal review call scheduled for Friday

touches.ai_summary: 24-minute proposal review call. Layla expressed enthusiasm about the features but raised concerns about budget. She's the primary decision-maker but hinted at needing to justify the spend. Discussed ROI in terms of time saved on manual forecasting.

questions_asked.question: Beyond yourself, who needs to sign off on a purchase of this size?
questions_asked.answer: I have budget authority up to this amount, so it's really my call. Just want to make sure we're getting the best value.

questions_asked.question: What's your typical contract length for deals like this?
questions_asked.answer: Standard is annual, though we offer quarterly for smaller pilots.

questions_asked.question: Can you remind me how the unlimited automation tier differs from the standard plan?
questions_asked.answer: Unlimited tier includes custom workflow builders, API access, and advanced forecasting models vs. the 50 automation limit on standard.

objections: The pricing is a bit higher than I was hoping for our initial rollout
next_steps: Layla to review internally over weekend
Discuss final terms early next week

touches.ai_summary: 18-minute negotiation call focused heavily on pricing. Layla requested additional discount to get deal approved. Discussed payment terms and contract start date. Some back-and-forth on discount justification.

questions_asked.question: Would you be able to come down another 10% to help me get this over the line?
questions_asked.answer: I've already stretched to get you the current pricing. Let me see what I can do on payment terms instead.

questions_asked.question: Is there anything else holding this back besides pricing?
questions_asked.answer: No, if we can land on a number that works, I'm ready to move forward.

objections: I need to see more movement on price to justify this to my team
next_steps: Rep to check with leadership on additional discount

touches.ai_summary: 23-minute final negotiation call. Agreed to 27.4% total discount to close the deal. Layla committed to moving forward pending final paperwork review. Discussed implementation timeline and kickoff planning. Overall tone was collaborative but price-focused.

questions_asked.question: If we can meet at this price point, are you ready to sign this week?
questions_asked.answer: Yes, I can get the paperwork turned around in 24-48 hours if we land here.

questions_asked.question: When would we be able to start implementation?
questions_asked.answer: We can kick off within 5 business days of signed contract.

next_steps: Send updated contract with final pricing
Layla to review and return signed by end of week
